package rulecoverage

func PositiveRouteRegistrationTestsDuplicateFullBootstrapPerFile() string {
    ruleID := "route_registration_tests_duplicate_full_bootstrap_per_file"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Tests that rebuild the full application bootstrap repeatedly instead of using shared test setup."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
